wordplay_note: A good woman in a ruined world
card_description: Bonny Keller (meaning "Bonny = beautiful/good") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Dr. Bloodmoney*. Survivor whose child Edie may have been fathered by the bomb-maker Bruno Bluthgeld. Name note: A good woman in a ruined world. Beauty and fertility persisting amid nuclear devastation. First appears in *Dr. Bloodmoney*.

reference.brief: Survivor whose child Edie may have been fathered by the bomb-maker Bruno Bluthgeld
reference.significance: Beauty and fertility persisting amid nuclear devastation
